_readme: Narration cues: element -> the phrase in the voiceover it should land on.
'at' is GENERATED by scripts/build-audio-cues.js — seconds from the SCENE's start.
Edit 'cue' (and optional 'lead', negative to land slightly BEFORE the word), then re-run the script.
motion.ts reads 'at' and overrides the guider's startMs; everything else (from/to, easing, orbit, idle) still comes from animation.json.
Elements with no entry here keep their animation.json timing — correct for bg/decor/waves, which are not cued to words.

WARNING: several SVG ids do NOT describe what they draw (frame_6 'swing_arrow' is the quote card, 'wind_arrows' is the bulb thought-bubble, 'label_kick_ahead' is the real swing arrow, 'idea_bulb' is the gears icon). Always check the artwork before writing a cue — 'is' records what was verified.
